construct_verdict_reason: All three items measure distinct but semantically related dimensions of police institutional legitimacy: perceived corruption, human rights violations, and normative acceptance of police authority.

items.reason: Directly measures perceived corruption, a key component of institutional trustworthiness and legitimacy.
Directly measures perceived human rights violations, a critical dimension of police legitimacy and trustworthiness.
Directly measures normative acceptance of police authority and compliance with police decisions, a core element of institutional legitimacy.
